chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-714 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case. 03-02-2025 M/s Syed Zaffar Ali Shah and Athar Hussain Abro, Advocates for applicant/complainant. M/s Jahangir Kalhoro and Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocates for respondents/ accused. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents/accused submits that said respondents/accused, against whom cancellation of bail has been sought by the applicant/complainant through this Crl. Misc. Application, have been acquitted of the charge by trial Court vide judgment dated 19.12.2024, passed by learned 1st Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate (MTMC), Kandiaro in Crl. Case No.147 of 2024 re: State- Versus Hakim Ali and others, arising out of Crime No.13 of 2024, registered at P.S, Kamal Dero, under section 382 PPC; therefore, this application has become infructuous. In view of above development, learned counsel for the applicant/complainant does not wish to press this Crl. Misc. Application, as the same has become infructuous, to which learned Deputy P.G for the State has recorded no objection. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed as having become infructuous. JUDGE Ahmad
